ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

As part of our quarterly IT security review, the corporate VPN will undergo a mandatory maintenance window on **Wednesday, 15th May 2026 from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST**.

During this period, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable. Please plan your work accordingly and ensure that you have offline access to any critical documents.

**What you need to do:**
1. Log out of the VPN before 01:30 AM on 15th May.
2. Save any open files from the VPN‑connected drives.
3. Re‑connect after 04:30 AM.

If you encounter any issues post‑maintenance, report them to the IT helpdesk via the ticketing system (Ticket ID: VPN‑MTN‑2026‑05).

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

Rajeev Sharma
IT Security Lead
XYZ Pvt. Ltd.

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks Invoice Overdue – Pay Now to Avoid Service Interruption
spam.body:
Hello,

We noticed that your QuickBooks account has an **overdue invoice (Invoice #QBK-2026-041)** that remains unpaid. If this payment is not settled within the next 48 hours, your QuickBooks services will be suspended and you may lose access to your financial data.

**Invoice Details**
- Amount Due: ₹12,450
- Due Date: 30th April 2026
- Service: QuickBooks Online Plus

To secure your account, please click the link below to view and pay the invoice immediately:

<URL>

Once the payment is confirmed, your services will be restored within 24 hours. If you have already made the payment, kindly ignore this notice. Please keep a copy of your transaction receipt for future reference.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Billing Team
Customer Support
